rationale: The ensures conjuncts about `post1_self_` / `post2_self_` form the LHS of the implication in the postcondition, so they are not free hypotheses in the proof body. We wrap every cross-run assertion in `if <antecedent> { ... }` so the LHS becomes a path condition. Inside, we (1) align the two runs by going through `pre_self_` with explicit `#![trigger post1_self_.get_X(_), post2_self_.get_X(_)]` annotations, (2) case-split on `t_ptr == queue0` / `c_ptr == owning_c` / `e_ptr == endpoint_ptr` to use the scalar per-field ensures for the affected entity, and (3) derive Map ext-equal of each `*_perms@` from (dom equal) + (addr from wf) + (is_init from wf) + (value equal via get_X) — closing the determinism predicate.
